Intraday post (20/Aug)

Weekly post:

Weekly post (18-22/Aug)

Why Sept cut odds are still high? - Intraday post (15/Aug)

Mean reversion signal UPDATE!

Plus:

My basic trading principles

(And for people who keep asking me about geo, I posted researches about the current challenge of the Western World on twitter. The dilemma is serious for the US and the stake is very high. Read it carefully)

Let’s look at what Galton-board does today’s positioning paints…

INTRADAY POSTCoding today’s positioning:

The profile is a short fly profile concentrating arounf 6407.48, with a net negative gamma convexity (speed), with relatively heavy right tail (heavier than the past two days).

The market is basically betting on a pin to the centroid of the profile at 6398.93 And they expect heavy liquidity until 6388.53; below this the liquidity is lower locally, and opens the gate for a grind-down towards 6375/70; but then they expect reversion back to the center of the fly.

The upside can be materialized only if price opens above the centroid line, and skew is sold at 6412.63 upside pivot. The target is 6430/35 (margin of error is 6440… after 1.10PM it can pin, if 6425 holds) then reversion back to the center of the fly.

This corrective rangebound is the main bet of the market for today.

A right-tailish event would be heavy skew selling above the upside pivot at the marked zone and pin to 6440 during the PM, with upsticks to 6450 - this is a less likely scenario, but 10.27% more likely than the downside one:Heavy skew bid and stubborn consolidation at 6375/70 could produce a grind lower to 6355 and pin back to 6370.

OptionsDepth Heatmap

Today is a good day for a fast reversion trading during the AM. Otherwise I’m leaning towards put selling at 6370 and 6325, also ready to short 0DTEs at the center of the fly…
